steps.t: Basil Gummidge has travelled with you to the Sparring Circle of Ost Forod. Basil Gummidge is waiting to speak with you inside the Sparring Circle.
Cuthbert Sprunt has revealed his true colours and has called upon his cronies for aid. Basil Gummidge has leapt to your defence, and with his aid, you…
Basil Gummidge is in the Sparring Circle of Ost Forod. You and Basil Gummidge have successfully overcome Cuthbert Sprunt's treachery. You should speak…
